title: fagelia excelsa
intro: Fagelia excelsa, also known as the Fagelia tree or mountain fagelia, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids in its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Fagelia excelsa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Fagelia excelsa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are made by boiling the leaves and stems in water to extract its medicinal properties.
